rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 22, 2016 line 1. DEFENDANT JULIA MWANGI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication continued to September 16, 2016 to be heard in department 306 at 9:30 A.m. This action is singly assigned to the Honorable Richard B. Ulmer by the order of the Presiding Judge. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 22, 2016 line 2. Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt. Hearing Required. Defendant and his counsel to be present in Court. Defendant to bring the keys to the front gate to the hearing. Both parties to call department 501 to confirm that tentative ruling was received by no later than 4:30 p.m. on August 19, 2016 (415-551-3779 or 415-551-3762). Defense counsel and defendant were advised that this Court issues tentative rulings and of the "tentative ruling rule" by the Court on August 5, 2016. Plaintiff to file Proof of Service for August 5, 2016 order no later than August 22, 2016 by 9:00 a.m. and provide a courtesy copy to the Court. = (501/REQ)
